title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (11) لسنة 2001 بإلغاء المرسوم بقانون بشأن تدابير أمن الدولة
title_en: Decree No. (8) of 2001 ratifying the Convention Between the Government of The State of Bahrain and the Government of the Morocco for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with respect to Taxes on Income
